input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
P=json.load(open('work/preds.json'))
P['575662']={'Abu Dhabi':0.18,'Riyadh':0.10,'Istanbul':0.07,'Geneva':0.05}
json.dump(P,open('work/preds.json','w'),indent=1,ensure_ascii=False)
print('synced')
"
